title: Smooth Motion Illusion Video Edit
brief: Edit a video for Dan Chan a Master Magician and Mentalist! If you get 4 stars or more. You can use this in your portfolio to promote your editing skills even if you don't win! Get a chance to test your limits with special effects and editing with this magical project! Please edit this video... https://youtu.be/Ee2yIZeNOzA At 0:35 - the part where he says orange... Pause the video… (Dan asked him to name yellow or red)… *(wait for dramatic effect) yet he said “orange”. On-screen text: "Notice the color of Dan's tie and pocket square..." (Zoom in on the tie and pocket square. OR a glowing outline, animated arrows, or a subtle pulsing highlight to draw attention.) Try one or more of those effects. Pause. "Did Dan's orange tie influence his choice?" (Add a question mark animation, then slowly fade the highlights.) Fade to black. At 1:15, add the image below as a large overlay on the right side of the screen so viewers can clearly see what is being displayed on the phone. If possible, animate the app icons so they subtly "pop," grow, pulse, or highlight as I say each corresponding letter. This will help direct the viewer's attention and reinforce the connection between what I'm saying and what appears on screen. Please keep the overlay large enough to be easily readable, but position it so it does not block Dan or the phone during the performance. https://drive.google.com/file/d/1nI-Py-RbD9c7c9LkSoYW4CXiya-Lped3/view?usp=drivesdk Maybe some arrows showing pause frame that did poin
